title: Impact Triptych
description: A three-image high-speed photography series with the same black studio, rim light, and frozen-impact visual language.
creative_direction: Series focused on physical timing and lighting continuity: different impacts, same black studio, macro lens, crisp frozen motion, and rim-lit particles.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first to establish black studio and flash language. Use 01 URL as --ref for 02 and 03 for lighting/style continuity.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Impact Triptych
en.description: Three high-speed studio images with consistent flash lighting.

zh-CN.title: 冲击三联画
zh-CN.description: 三张保持一致闪光灯语言的高速棚拍图。
